allow: PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, @{N='CPU\(s\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.CPU,1\)}}, @{N='Mem\(MB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet/1MB,0\)}}, StartTime | Sort-Object 'CPU\(s\)' -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell("Ports owned by 22116:"; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -OwningProcess 22116 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort | Format-Table -AutoSize; "All node listeners:"; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName -eq 'node' } | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize)
